al Samhitn
(1) Portents through idols of Gods in Temples,
mm* H^r^iRTq \\*\\
The breaking, moving, sweating, shedding tears, falling,
muttering and the like, of Siva's Emblems, idols of Gods and tem-
ples (or holy places), without any cause, forebode the destruction of
kings and their countries.

nen
The breaking or falling down of the axle, wheel, yoke, and
flag of the car during a temple festival do not augur well for the
king and his country. Similarly their being twisted, destroyed and
entangled are evil for both.
[gTqpTnrt is another reading in the place of t^tTTqi.]
